Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Trent Goulding, Esq.(415-576-9923) for Petitioner/Moving party Qiu Yue Zhong.
No other Appearances.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. ARGUED. Petitioner submits a copy of the Proof of Service in open Court Court that was e-filed. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Petitioner's Notice of Hearing for Release of Mechanic's Lien is taken under submission**. Petitioner submits a proposed order. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
